title: hypericum lanuginosum
intro: Hypericum lanuginosum, also known as woodland St. John's Wort or downy St. John's Wort, is a flowering plant species within the St. John's Wort genus. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, as well as its ability to stimulate the nervous system and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Hypericum lanuginosum include its potential to treat anxiety and depression, improve sleep quality, and reduce pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant's aerial parts are typically dried and used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be cautioned due to potential interactions with certain medications.
